ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race event */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race event */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Type of cycling discipline (e.g., Road Race, Mountain Bike) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the race (e.g., Cat 1/2/3) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the riders participating in the race */,
  "race_class" TEXT /* Class of the riders participating in the race (e.g., Senior) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the riders participating in the race (e.g., 1-99) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "race_organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race organizer */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "riders" (
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rider */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the rider */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the rider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the rider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the rider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the rider */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the rider */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the rider */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the rider in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the rider in kilograms */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the rider's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the rider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* URL to the team's social media profiles */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rider participating in the race */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place achieved by the rider in the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the rider to complete the race */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the rider during the race in km/h */,
  "rank_in_category" INTEGER /* Rank of the rider within their category */,
  "rank_in_gender" INTEGER /* Rank of the rider within their gender */,
  "rank_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the rider in the race */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the rider's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rider_teams" (
  "rider_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rider-team association */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rider */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the rider joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the rider left the team (if applicable) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the rider in the team (e.g., Captain, Member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rider_teams_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rider_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  "sponsor_website" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's official website */,
  "sponsor_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_sponsors" (
  "team_sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-sponsor association */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_date" TEXT /* Date when the sponsorship began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the sponsorship ended (if applicable) */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_sponsors_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rider */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average speed, total distance) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., km/h, km) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Race, Training) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)
